calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF EXAMINATION CALENDAR
Off Calendar Aug-15-2016 Discharged

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-02-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearance on Thursday, June 02, 2016 in Department 525:
Freidon Waziri, Respondent/Plaintiff appears as Propria Persona.
No appearance by Appellant/Defendant Yassamin Mariyam Kavezade

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. Freidon Waziri is sworn.
Respondent/Plaintiff, Freidon Waziri testifies on his own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court. The following copies of documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit (A) - Operations Manager's letter, towing receipt, repair receipts, and list of itemized charges.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly marked evidence is retained.

Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles; Clerk J. Kong; Matter Not Reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Apr-26-2016 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
